title: Junior Business Development Manager at Phoenix Mills

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Phoenix Mills
jsonLd.description:
Phoenix Mills, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
